source_jobs.title: Lead Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Employers design their benefits and perks plan by setting a contribution amount and eligible spend categories. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

As a Lead Security Engineer at Benepass, you will build, operationalize, and scale the security engineering practices that protect our benefits platform and the sensitive employee, benefits, and financial data it processes. You will work across application security, cloud security, security architecture, supply chain security, detection engineering, and vulnerability management, balancing security depth with the speed and pragmatism required at Benepass.

Reporting to the Head of Infosec & GRC, you will be a senior individual contributor and technical lead with broad influence across Engineering, Product, Platform, and Compliance. You will partner deeply with the teams building our web and mobile applications, backend services, system integrations, card and banking workflows, infrastructure as code, and data platforms to turn risk reduction into scalable guardrails, automated controls, and clear engineering guidance.

You are a builder and security partner at heart - someone who can set direction and mature security capabilities. You know when to introduce strong standards, when to ship incremental improvements, and how to make secure paths the easiest paths for engineers without turning security into a centralized approval queue.




ROLE LOCATION & TRAVEL

This remote role is based in the United States or Canada. You will be expected to attend company-wide on-site events three to four times per year, as well as occasional on-site office travel as necessary.




ABOUT YOU

 - Security Engineering Technical Lead: You have operated as a senior IC or technical lead for security engineering work, setting strategy while staying hands-on with design reviews, code, automation, tooling, and operational follow-through.

 - Application Security Builder: Deep experience with secure SDLC practices, shift-left security, threat modeling, API security, SAST/code scanning, CI/CD security integrations, security QA, vulnerability management, and developer-friendly security UX.

 - Cloud Security Partner: Comfortable partnering with Platform Engineering on IAM, KMS, CloudTrail, GuardDuty, Security Hub, VPC and network segmentation, WAF, Secrets Manager, RDS, S3, infrastructure-as-code security, container security, and continuous cloud posture management.

 - Security Architecture Partner: Able to reason about access control, encryption standards, certificate management, vaulting, key man

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

As a Senior GRC Analyst at Benepass, you will help operate and mature the governance, risk, compliance, audit readiness, and customer assurance programs that support our business, customers, and employees. You will work across security policies, internal controls, audit evidence, risk tracking, security questionnaires, and compliance operations.

Reporting to the Head of Infosec & GRC, you will be a key individual contributor on a lean security team. You will partner closely with Security, Engineering, IT, People, Legal, Finance, Sales, Customer Success, and Product to make our security and compliance programs clear, practical, and reliable.

You are detail-oriented, organized, and pragmatic. You know how to bring structure to ambiguity, communicate clearly with technical and non-technical stakeholders, and balance compliance rigor with the speed of a growing startup.




ROLE LOCATION & TRAVEL

This remote role is based in the United States or Canada. You will be expected to attend company-wide on-site events three to four times per year, as well as occasional on-site office travel as necessary.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Governance & Policy: Maintain and improve information security policies, standards, procedures, control documentation, and related governance materials.

 - Control Mapping: Help map policies and controls to frameworks such as SOC 2, ISO 27001/27002, HITRUST, NIST CSF 2.0, and other customer, regulatory, or security requirements.

 - Policy Operations: Support policy exceptions, risk acceptances, remediation tracking, control owner follow-ups, and recurring governance workflows.

 - Compliance & Audit Readiness: Support SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HITRUST readiness, audit preparation, evidence collection, auditor coordination, and audit response management.

 - Control Testing: Maintain recurring evidence-gathering and control testing workflows, helping ensure controls operate consistently across the business.

 - Findings & Remediation: Track audit findings, control gaps, remediation plans, owners, due dates, and closure evidence.

 - Risk Management: Support risk assessments, control gap assessments, internal reviews, and maintenance of the risk register.

 - Business Communication: Translate technical and security risks into clear business language, including mitigations, ownership, timelines, and residual risk.

 - Customer Assurance: Own or support custome

source_jobs.title: Lead Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Employers design their benefits and perks plan by setting a contribution amount and eligible spend categories. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




THE ROLE


Benepass is reimagining how employees discover, understand, and engage with their benefits – and we’re looking for a Lead Product Manager to own a major part of that experience end to end.

This role is for a senior product manager who wants real ownership in a small, high-trust team. You’ll take responsibility for a strategic product area, shape its direction, and drive it from early discovery through delivery and iteration. The scope is meaningful, the problems are ambiguous, and the impact is highly visible.

You’ll work closely with product leadership and cross-functional partners, with autonomy to run your domain and accountability for outcomes. This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys both strategic thinking and building.




WHAT YOU’LL DO


As the owner of this product area, you’ll be accountable for setting direction, making tradeoffs, and driving outcomes. You will:


 - Own a strategic product area focused on employee discovery and engagement, from problem definition through execution

 - Reimagine core employee-facing experiences that help users better understand their benefits and discover relevant options

 - Define the strategy and roadmap for your area, making and owning tradeoffs based on user needs, business goals, and constraints

 - Lead product discovery to deeply understand employee and employer problems, and translate insights into clear product direction

 - Partner closely with Design, Engineering, Product Marketing, and other teams to deliver cohesive, high-quality experiences

 - Drive execution end to end, keeping work moving forward and adjusting course as new information emerges

 - Use data, feedback, and judgment to evaluate impact and continuously improve what you build

You’ll be trusted to operate independently within your domain, while collaborating closely with product leadership on prioritization and broader context.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



This role is a strong fit if you:

 - Have 6+ years of experience as a Product Manager, with increasing ownership over time

 - Have experience working at a startup or similarly fast-moving environment, where scope is broad and ambiguity is high

 - Are comfortable owning a problem space end to end, from framing through delivery

 - Can balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution

 - Communicate clearly and proactively, especially when navigating tradeoffs or uncertainty

 - Are

source_jobs.title: Senior Implementation Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Employers design their benefits and perks plan by setting a contribution amount and eligible spend categories. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Senior Implementation Manager to lead the onboarding and implementation of our most strategic, high-value customers. This role is responsible for delivering a seamless, high-quality implementation experience for a focused book of 5–7 enterprise clients, ensuring strong foundations for long-term partnership and success.

This individual is a highly skilled project manager, a clear and confident communicator, and thrives in fast-paced, high-stakes environments. They bring strong attention to detail, executive presence, and the ability to navigate complex stakeholder landscapes both internally and externally.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own end-to-end implementations for a portfolio of 5–7 enterprise and strategic customers, from kickoff through go-live and handoff

 - Act as the primary point of contact for customer stakeholders, including senior and executive-level partners

 - Develop and manage detailed project plans, timelines, and deliverables across complex, multi-workstream implementations

 - Drive cross-functional alignment across internal teams (Product, Engineering, Customer Success, Operations, etc.) to ensure successful execution

 - Proactively identify and mitigate risks, managing escalations with urgency and clarity

 - Lead effective, structured communication with both internal and external stakeholders, including regular status updates and executive readouts

 - Ensure a high-quality customer experience, balancing speed with accuracy and attention to detail

 - Continuously improve implementation processes by identifying patterns, gaps, and opportunities for scalability

 - Serve as a trusted advisor to customers, guiding them through best practices and complex decision-making


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 6–8+ years of experience in implementation, onboarding, project management, or customer-facing delivery roles, preferably in SaaS or enterprise environments

 - Proven experience managing large, complex, and high-value implementations with multiple stakeholders

 - Exceptional project management skills, with the ability to manage competing priorities and tight timelines

 - Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience working with executive audiences

 - Demonstrated ability to thrive in fast-paced, evolving environments

 - Highly detail-oriented and organized, with a strong sense of ownership and accountability

source_jobs.description:

OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

We’re looking for a Product Operations Manager to own how product work gets operationalized across the business. You will report directly to our Head of Customer Operations, Aileen Palmer.

This role sits within Operations but is deeply embedded with our technical teams. You’ll partner closely with Product and Engineering Managers to understand what’s being built, anticipate downstream impact, and ensure every launch is fully supported across internal teams and customers.

This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, can connect technical work to operational impact, and takes ownership of getting launches across the finish line.




WHAT YOU'LL DO AT BENEPASS

As a Product Operations Manager, you will:

Own launch readiness end-to-end

 - Drive launch readiness across all product and engineering workstreams

 - Build and manage project plans, timelines, and milestones, working backward from launch

 - Define readiness criteria and make final go / no-go recommendations

 - Run a weekly launch readiness sync to track progress, surface risks, and drive accountability

 - Identify downstream impact of product launches on Operations workflows, and ensure associated documentation and process updates are made

 - Monitor post-launch feedback, ensuring issues are resolved, and learnings are captured

 - Collaborate closely with our existing Operations Enablement function

Partner closely with Product & Engineering

 - Work directly with Product and Engineering Managers to understand the roadmap and upcoming sprint work

 - Evaluate initiatives for user, administrative, and internal operational impact, including potential effects on support volume

 - Translate technical work into clear operational implications and requirements

 - Ensure operational considerations are incorporated early in planning, not just at launch

Own Ops → Product Roadmap & Prioritization

 - Own a consolidated Ops roadmap across CX, CS, Implementation, and TAM, bringing a single, clear view of priorities

 - Build a structured system to synthesize Ops asks into clearly defined problem statements, and use cases

 - Quantify impact (revenue, retention, efficiency, risk) and help size opportunities to support prioritization (role needs to be analytical, and use Ops data - CX ticket data, Ops costs etc, - to drive clear prioritization)

 - Act as the single threaded owner of Ops → Product al

source_jobs.description:

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring a Staff Product Manager to own our fintech strategy and partnerships.

This role will define how we build and scale the financial infrastructure behind Benepass. You’ll manage our core fintech partners and determine how we leverage them to deliver differentiated product experiences.

A key part of this role is answering: where should we build vs. partner—and how does that evolve over time?

You’ll operate as a senior individual contributor, working cross-functionally and externally to shape our roadmap, improve reliability, and unlock new capabilities for our customers.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own Benepass’ fintech stack strategy, including build vs. partner decisions, across multiple time horizons

 - Manage and deepen relationships with key partners

 - Ensure existing integrations are stable, scalable, and fully utilized

 - Identify gaps in current capabilities and drive solutions with partners or internal teams

 - Align partner capabilities with our product roadmap and influence roadmap decisions

 - Evaluate and onboard new partners to expand our product offering

 - Act as the primary point of contact for fintech partners across product, engineering, and executive stakeholders

 - Lead issue resolution, escalations, and ongoing optimization work with partners

 - Represent Benepass in partner conversations and industry events

 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 6+ years of product management experience, with significant time building fintech products (e.g. card issuance, bank accounts, AR/AP, payments)

 - Deep understanding of the money ecosystem, including card issuance, processors, payment rails, and bank cores

 - Experience working directly with BaaS partners (e.g., Stripe, Unit, Marqeta, Lithic, Treasury Prime, Column, Increase, etc.)

 - Proven track record of owning both partnership relationships and technical implementations

 - Strong product judgment and ability to navigate complex tradeoffs

 - Excellent communication skills and comfort working with external partners and executives


NICE TO HAVE:

 - Experience with brokerage or trading infrastructure

 - Project management experience in BaaS partner migration

 - Relationships and experience with sponsor banks

 - In-depth knowledge of compliance requirements, including build vs. buy considerations

 


WHY THIS ROLE

 - Own a critical and highly strategic part of the product

OUR INVESTORS

ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Senior Director of People Operations to establish and lead the People function at Benepass as we scale past 100 employees. As our first senior HR hire, this role will be both strategic and hands-on, owning everything from core HR operations, policies and compliance to, performance management, total rewards, benefits, manager development, and organizational design. This leader will build scalable people programs and infrastructure, partner with leadership on workforce planning and culture, and help Benepass grow thoughtfully while maintaining a strong employee experience

This role will establish the systems, programs, and processes that create a best-in-class employee experience and enable Benepass to scale effectively. A major focus will be developing the right people infrastructure — implementing and optimizing our HR tech stack, benefits administration, and compensation frameworks — while ensuring compliance and operational excellence. You’ll partner closely with company leadership to shape the future of our organization and people strategy.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and lead the People function across HR operations, employee experience, and strategic people initiatives.

 - Design and implement HR infrastructure, including payroll, HRIS, and benefits administration systems that can scale with company growth.

 - Lead compensation and benefits strategy, partnering with Finance and leadership to evolve salary frameworks (including evaluating geo-based ranges) and optimize total rewards.

 - Oversee all aspects of the employee lifecycle, including onboarding, performance management, development, and offboarding.

 - Act as a trusted advisor to executives and people managers on organizational design, leadership development, and employee relations.

 - Negotiate and manage benefit programs with external brokers and partners to ensure competitive, compliant, and cost-effective offerings.

 - Develop and maintain people data infrastructure to enable accurate reporting, analytics, and compliance across jurisdictions.

 - Drive cultural initiatives that enhance engagement, belonging, and manager effectiveness.

 - Lead annual review cycles for performance, compensation, and goal-setting, ensuring alignment with company strategy.

 - Plan for scale, laying the groundwork for future programs in manager enablement, learning and development, and workforce pla

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

Benepass is hiring a Manager, Customer Lifecycle Marketing to own how we engage customers (employers) and their employees (members) across the full lifecycle.

This role is responsible for shaping and executing the post-sale marketing experience, from onboarding and launch through ongoing engagement, open enrollment, and renewal. You will drive how Benepass shows up at each stage, ensuring our benefits are clearly understood, consistently used, and deliver measurable value to both employers and employees.

Sitting within Marketing and reporting to Product Marketing, this role partners closely with Customer Success, Customer Experience, Product, and Engineering to bring lifecycle programs to life. Success in this role means improving activation, increasing utilization, and driving long-term customer value across the Benepass platform.




WHAT YOU'LL DO AT BENEPASS


LIFECYCLE STRATEGY & JOURNEY DESIGN

 - Define how Benepass engages customers and members across onboarding, activation, engagement, and renewal

 - Build lifecycle programs that drive adoption, education, and sustained usage

 - Identify gaps in the customer journey and develop programs to improve the overall experience


MEMBER ENGAGEMENT & UTILIZATION

 - Develop campaigns that increase benefit awareness, card usage, and program adoption

 - Create communications tied to key lifecycle moments (launch, open enrollment, seasonal usage)

 - Translate complex benefits and financial concepts into simple, compelling messaging


CUSTOMER COLLABORATION & PROGRAM SUPPORT

 - Build and manage lifecycle campaigns across email, in-product messaging, printed materials, and other touchpoints

 - Own segmentation and targeting to deliver relevant messaging to different audiences

 - Ensure communications are timely, clear, and aligned with customer needs

 - Support time-sensitive and ad hoc campaigns (e.g., product updates, compliance changes, critical customer communications), ensuring rapid and high-quality execution


CROSS-FUNCTIONAL ALIGNMENT & MESSAGING INTEGRATION

 - Collaborate with Product Marketing and Customer Success to support launches, renewals, and expansion opportunities

 - Develop scalable frameworks for client-specific communications where needed

 - Balance customization with consistency and operational efficiency


PERFORMANCE TRACKING & CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT

 - Define and track lifecycle KPIs (

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

Benepass is building financial infrastructure that powers how companies fund, control, and deliver benefits globally.

We are hiring a Staff Software Engineer to own and evolve the systems at the core of our platform: ledgering, transaction processing, decisioning, and money movement. These systems are responsible for tracking and moving real funds, enforcing complex rules, and maintaining a precise and auditable source of truth.

This is not a typical backend role. You will be working on high-integrity financial systems where correctness, consistency, and reliability matter more than raw throughput — and where small mistakes can have real financial impact.

This role is ideal for engineers who have built or operated systems in payments, card issuing, wallets, banking infrastructure, or global money movement platforms, and want to take end-to-end ownership of a growing fintech layer.




YOU WILL

 - Design and operate systems responsible for:
   
   - Ledgering (double-entry systems, balances, transaction history, reconciliation)
   
   - Transaction processing pipelines (authorization, capture, settlement flows)
   
   - Real-time decisioning (spend controls, eligibility, rules engines)
   
   - Money movement, including support for multi-currency and global transactions

 - Build systems that are correct by design:
   
   - Define and always maintain invariants to ensure correctness under all operational conditions
   
   - Idempotent
   
   - Strongly consistent where required
   
   - Fully auditable

 - Own the lifecycle of financial transactions end-to-end, including:
   
   - State transitions
   
   - Failure handling and retries
   
   - Reconciliation and reporting

 - Integrate with external financial partners (processors, banks, networks) and handle unreliable and asynchronous dependencies

 - Lead architectural decisions and write technical approach documents that clarify trade-offs and long-term implications

 - Improve system resilience, observability, and operational tooling as volume and complexity grow

 - Mentor other engineers and help define best practices for building financial systems

OUR TECHNOLOGY AND STACK

Python, Django, Django Rest Framework, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, React, TypeScript




REQUIREMENTS

 - Experience building or operating financial systems such as payments, card issuing, wallets, or banking infrastructure

 - Deep understan

source_jobs.title: Manager, Proposals & Content Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Employers design their benefits and perks plan by setting a contribution amount and eligible spend categories. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




OVERVIEW

Benepass is hiring our first Manager, Proposals & Content Operations to build and own our end-to-end RFP and proposal function. As we continue to scale upmarket and increase deal complexity, this role will define the systems, content foundation, and processes that enable high-quality, consistent, and efficient responses across the business. This is a zero-to-one role with significant ownership, partnering closely with Sales, Strategic Alliances, and Product Marketing to improve win rates, reduce sales burden, and elevate how we show up in competitive enterprise opportunities. A key part of this role will be leveraging AI and automation to scale output and continuously improve quality.




ROLE AND RESPONSIBILITIES




PROPOSAL & RFP OWNERSHIP

 - Own the end-to-end proposal and RFP process from intake through submission and follow-up

 - Drive cross-functional coordination across Sales, Strategic Alliances, Solutions Consulting, Product, Product Marketing and other stakeholders to ensure timely, high-quality responses

 - Establish clear timelines, roles, and SLAs to bring structure and predictability to the process


CONTENT STRATEGY & LIBRARY MANAGEMENT

 - Build and maintain a centralized content library, ensuring responses are accurate, up-to-date, and aligned to Benepass’s positioning

 - Partner closely with Product Marketing to refine messaging based on RFP trends, buyer feedback, and competitive insights

 - Continuously improve core materials including standard responses, executive summaries, and proposal templates


QUALITY, WRITING & CUSTOMIZATION

 - Draft, edit, and QA proposal responses with a focus on clarity, differentiation, and alignment to client needs

 - Tailor responses for enterprise and strategic accounts, balancing customization with scalability

 - Ensure consistency in tone, voice, and messaging across all submissions


SYSTEMS, TOOLING & AI ENABLEMENT

 - Leverage AI tools to accelerate drafting, improve response quality, and enforce consistency in tone and messaging

 - Identify opportunities to automate and streamline the proposal workflow, reducing manual effort and increasing throughput

 - Evaluate, implement, and manage proposal tools and systems that support scale

 - Continuously test and refine workflows to improve efficiency without compromising quality


CROSS-FUNCTIONAL COLLABORATION

 - Partner closely with subject matter experts ac

source_jobs.title: Senior Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Benepass we're making benefits easy. We believe people are the most important asset to any company. Traditional one-size-fits-all benefits packages no longer cut it in today's hybrid and remote-first environment. With Benepass, companies can tailor their benefits to the unique needs of their workforce.

Through our easy-to-use and highly customizable fintech platform, People teams can implement, administer, and track the benefits that meet employees where they are. Employers design their benefits and perks plan by setting a contribution amount and eligible spend categories. Every employee has their own individual definition of wellness and needs different things to help them be their most productive, fulfilled self.




OUR MISSION

Helping companies reimagine how companies take care of their people.




OUR INVESTORS

We are backed by leading investors, including Centana Growth Partners, Portage Ventures, Threshold Ventures, Gradient Ventures, Workday Ventures, and Clocktower Technology Ventures. To date, the company has raised approximately $75 million in equity capital.




ARTICLES

 - Founder Story - Jaclyn Chen https://bit.ly/3FpQ0ti

 - Benepass Raises $40M Series B https://getbenepass.com/blog/benepass-raises-40m-series-b-to-help-employers-redesign-benefits-for-rising-healthcare-costs


CANDIDATE RESOURCES

 - Benepass | Candidate Resource Page https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_OTFvktl-2SoxPn_tkZzyHECSKM0V14hVZOy1ZdZ8zE/edit?usp=sharing

 - Benepass Listed on Inc. Magazine's Best Workplaces of 2023 https://bit.ly/3EAXv0Q




TEAM & ROLE

As a Senior Customer Success Manager, you will manage a portfolio of customers, reporting directly to our Head of Customer Operations, Aileen Palmer. We are hiring two Senior Customer Success Managers: one to support our SMB customer segment and one to support our Midmarket customer segment. While both roles share the same core responsibilities, the size and complexity of the assigned book of business will vary.

You will be responsible for managing and nurturing client relationships to ensure customer satisfaction, retention, and growth.

This role involves working closely with customers to understand their needs, providing tailored solutions, and ensuring they derive maximum value from our products. Depending on your experience and assigned portfolio, you'll partner with organizations ranging from growing SMBs to more complex midmarket customers. In addition to owning a book of business, the Senior Customer Success Manager will contribute to the continuous improvement of our processes by collaborating with Product, Sales, Engineering, Support, and Strategic Alliances teams.

Currently, our Customer Success team is composed of:

 - 8 Customer Success Managers

It's an exciting time to join our Customer Success team as we continue to grow. This is a fantastic opportunity to shape and influence customer success processes while working with an innovative team. Whether your experience is managing high-volume SMB accounts or building strategic partnerships with mid-market customers, we'd love to hear from you!



WHAT YOU'LL DO AT BENEPASS

 - Manage a portfolio of SMB and/or mid-market clients through all stages of the customer lifecycle, from onboarding to ongoing success planning

 - Drive admin platform education and adoption by providing regular check-ins, product training, and best practice guidance

 - Identify growth opportunities within your accounts and collaborate with sales on upsell and expansion strategies

 - Monitor customer health metrics and proactively address at-risk accounts

 - Gather and communicate customer feedback to product and engineering teams to help shape our roadmap

 - Develop scalable processes and resources tailored to the unique needs of SMB clients


ABOUT YOU

 - You are relationship-focused and enjoy helping customers achieve their goals

 - You're organized and efficient, able to manage multiple accounts simultaneously while providing

notes: Fintech company with a focus on benefits and HR solutions. Strong product and engineering presence, with a mix of technical and non-technical roles.
